original: Buying underwear to size is such a bother - and a complete impossibility for zaika with their unique anatomy! That’s why GabMart Threadz engineered and produced their patented shrinkwrap bra. Made from a custom-designed smart material that’s definitely not cheap plastic infused with cheaper microbots, this garment will intelligently contract down around any size of chest when held in place, and when the evening comes, it’s as easy as pressing the quick-release to let it billow back out to its full, excessive size.\n\nThese come in all kinds of hues and tints, but the most popular shade is apparently orange.
